---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug or regression
title: "[BUG] %short summary%"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Provide a one-line summary of the problem.

## Severity
Choose the severity that best fits the impact on users:
- P0 —> Release-blocker / data-loss / security
- P1 —> Major functionality broken
- P2 —> Minor bug / incorrect UI
- P3 —> Cosmetic / low impact

## Reproduction steps
Provide a minimal, numbered list of steps to reproduce the issue. Be explicit and include any data or configuration needed.
1. 
2. 
3. 

If possible include a minimal repro (codesandbox, repo link, curl command, or recorded screencast).

## Expected behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
Describe what happened instead, including error messages or incorrect outputs.

## Environment
- Project version / branch:
- Node / OS / Browser:
- Any integrations or external services involved:

## Logs / Stacktrace
Paste relevant logs, errors, or stacktraces (remove secrets / keys).

## Screenshots
If helpful, add screenshots or a short screencast.

## Possible fixes / notes
If you have an idea for a fix or a workaround, describe it here.

## Additional context
Any other context or details that might help debug the issue.
